user_query:
I’m organizing college and scholarship deadline reminders for my students and their recommenders. Please use the inputs in input/ and produce the following in the workspace:

Required outputs:
1) Extracted scholarships JSON: out/scholarships.json
   - Array of objects with fields: id, name, deadline (YYYY-MM-DD)
   - Source of truth: input/scholarships.html

2) Rewritten, concise message templates (one paragraph each, 60–120 words):
   - out/templates/student_application.md (must include placeholders {{ student_name }}, {{ college }}, {{ deadline_date }})
   - out/templates/student_scholarship.md (must include {{ student_name }}, {{ scholarship_name }}, {{ deadline_date }})
   - out/templates/recommender.md (must include {{ recommender_name }}, {{ student_name }}, {{ deadline_date }})
   Constraints:
   - Inspect input/mailer.py to confirm allowed placeholders and ensure the rewrites use only those placeholders and no others.
   - Keep tone polite, clear, and efficient for busy students/recommenders; avoid jargon and redundancy; no bullet lists.

3) A consolidated reminders schedule CSV: out/reminders.csv with columns:
   - recipient_name, recipient_email, audience (student|recommender), message_type (application|scholarship|recommendation), stage (pre-14|pre-3|post+2), related_name (college or scholarship), deadline_date (YYYY-MM-DD), send_datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM), timezone, template_path, subject

Scheduling rules (read input/reminder_config.yaml and apply exactly):
- For each application deadline per student (from input/students.csv), schedule student reminders at pre_deadline_days and one follow-up at followup_after_days after the deadline.
- For each recommendation deadline per student, schedule recommender reminders at the same offsets.
- For each scholarship listed in a student’s scholarship_ids that appears in input/scholarships.html, schedule student reminders at the same offsets.
- Use send_time and timezone from the config for the time of day and timezone. If a computed send date lands on Saturday or Sunday and weekday_only is true: shift PRE reminders backward to the previous Friday; shift POST follow-ups forward to the next Monday.
- Subjects: prefix with the appropriate subject_prefix from the config and keep under 70 characters. Include the related_name and deadline_date and indicate the stage (e.g., "[Chess Coaching] State University due 2026-11-15 (pre-14)").
- Template selection must use your rewritten templates in out/templates/ matching the audience and message_type.

Data sources and cross-validation:
- Parse input/scholarships.html to build out/scholarships.json (id, name, deadline). Only schedule scholarship reminders for scholarship_ids present in that extracted JSON.
- Parse input/students.csv for students/recommenders and deadlines.
- Inspect input/mailer.py for allowed placeholders and ensure your rewritten templates only use placeholders permitted by the renderer.
- Inspect input/reminder_config.yaml for scheduling offsets, weekday rules, subject prefixes, and template mappings.

Do not modify the files under input/. Produce only the files listed above under out/. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
